name: Local OpenAI-Compatible Support for rlm with LM Studio and examples

userStories.title: Add .env-driven local OpenAI configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want rlm to read local OpenAI-compatible endpoint configuration from .env so I can run locally without extra CLI flags.
acceptanceCriteria: Support .env-driven configuration for OPENAI_BASE_URL, OPENAI_API_KEY, and project model setting conventions
Local execution path does not require new CLI-only setup flags
Missing or invalid required config fails loudly with actionable error messages
uv run ruff check --fix . passes
uv run ruff format . passes
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Ensure OpenAI client supports LM Studio pass-through behavior
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want base URL and model names passed through without strict cloud model validation so LM Studio models like qwen/qwen-8b work.
acceptanceCriteria: OpenAI client forwards configured base URL to OpenAI-compatible endpoints
Model IDs are treated as pass-through values, including unknown cloud model names
No strict OpenAI cloud model list validation blocks local model IDs
No regression to existing cloud OpenAI path
uv run ruff check --fix . passes
uv run ruff format . passes
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Add deterministic tests for local config and pass-through behavior
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want unit tests for local configuration and model pass-through so behavior is reliable and regressions are caught.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover successful local .env configuration for OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Tests cover fail-fast behavior for missing or invalid required config
Tests verify model pass-through behavior with qwen/qwen-8b-style IDs
Tests include cloud OpenAI regression coverage where applicable
uv run ruff check --fix . passes
uv run ruff format . passes
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Classify examples by backend and mark non-OpenAI scope
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a clear OpenAI vs non-OpenAI examples classification so this work stays in scope and non-OpenAI examples remain unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit examples/ and identify all OpenAI-based examples targeted for local compatibility
Identify non-OpenAI examples and explicitly keep them unchanged
Document scope boundary between OpenAI-local-compatible and non-OpenAI examples
uv run ruff check --fix . passes
uv run ruff format . passes
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Update OpenAI-based examples for local endpoint compatibility
userStories.description: As a user, I want OpenAI-based examples to run against LM Studio with minimal changes so local evaluation works end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Apply only minimal code or configuration changes needed for local OpenAI-compatible execution
Every targeted OpenAI-based example in examples/ completes end-to-end against local endpoint
Non-OpenAI examples are not converted or refactored
uv run ruff check --fix . passes
uv run ruff format . passes
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Validate local example runs with qwen/qwen-8b
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want validation evidence using qwen/qwen-8b so local compatibility with LM Studio is confirmed.
acceptanceCriteria: Run OpenAI-based examples end-to-end against LM Studio with qwen/qwen-8b
Capture and document any required local setup assumptions for reproducibility
Confirm no required changes to non-OpenAI examples
uv run ruff check --fix . passes
uv run ruff format . passes
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Document local LM Studio workflow and boundaries
userStories.description: As a new contributor, I want clear documentation for local LM Studio setup so I can run OpenAI-compatible flows without cloud dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: Add concise run-locally documentation for LM Studio
Include .env template, launch steps, and troubleshooting guidance
Document support boundaries for non-OpenAI examples
Documentation is sufficient for a contributor to run local OpenAI-compatible flow
uv run ruff check --fix . passes
uv run ruff format . passes
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Run final quality gates and verify success metrics
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a final verification pass so all quality checks and PRD success metrics are satisfied.
acceptanceCriteria: Run final validation checklist for LM Studio setup and OpenAI-based examples
Confirm 100 percent of OpenAI-based examples pass locally end-to-end
Confirm non-OpenAI examples remain unchanged and documented out of scope
uv run ruff check --fix . passes
uv run ruff format . passes
uv run pytest passes
